statusDetail: Anton completed the scheduled site-improvement loop and recorded the result.
actionRequired: No action needed unless you want to review the latest commit.
summary:
Implemented the next Anton slice: Garage now has a read-only Recent Maintenance Notes preview at [garage.html](</C:/Users/diazv/Desktop/Ridgeline/garage.html:97>) that surfaces Service Prep and Maintenance Minder planner notes already saved into `ridgeline-notes.general_notes`. No Garage schema or vehicle facts changed.

Also updated:
- [garage.js](</C:/Users/diazv/Desktop/Ridgeline/garage.js:321>) to parse and render recent Maintenance-generated note blocks.
- [styles.css](</C:/Users/diazv/Desktop/Ridgeline/styles.css:5852>) for the new panel and iPhone stacking.
- [search-data.js](</C:/Users/diazv/Desktop/Ridgeline/search-data.js:316>) and [Invoke-BrowserSmoke.ps1](</C:/Users/diazv/Desktop/Ridgeline/tools/audit/Invoke-BrowserSmoke.ps1:42>) for `saved maintenance notes` coverage.
- Agent memory docs, including the next slice: real-device review of this Garage preview before larger job templates or parts/inventory handoffs.

Verification passed:
- `Invoke-BrowserSmoke.ps1 -Pages @('garage.html','maintenance.html')`
- `Invoke-SiteAudit.ps1 -Tag audit-v279-maintenance-notes-final -SkipScreenshots`
